summaryForNext: Both grounding questions answered from live fabric code. Dev IdP = static RSA JWKS (Option a: pre-generated key pair, JWKS served in compose). Keto: no wildcard — 2 exact tuple seeds (subscribe+view) with deterministic envelope id chosen by the smoke before publish. Required JWT claims: sub, tenant_id (UUID), aud=frf-gateway, exp. session_id/jti optional (generates fresh UUID if absent). MISSING: Keto write port :4467 not exposed to host in either fabric compose — needs a port mapping. No agent Rust change; pure smoke composition + spec update.
